name: @intentsolutionsio/api-security-scanner
description: Scan APIs for security vulnerabilities and OWASP API Top 10

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install api-security-scanner\\n  or /plugin install api-security-scanner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
